mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS contact_status_cd_nm FROM sy_contact c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CONTACT_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.contact_status_cd WHERE c.contact_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_contact c
